var isNiladic = /⍬/;

var isComment = /[⍝#].*$/;

var stringEater = function(type) {
  var prev;
  prev = false;
  return function(c) {
    prev = c;
    if (c === type) {
      return prev === "\\";
    }
    return true;
  };
};

const apl = {
  name: "apl",
  startState: function() {
    return {
      prev: false,
      func: false,
      op: false,
      string: false,
      escape: false
    };
  },
  token: function(stream, state) {
    var ch;
    if (stream.eatSpace()) {
      return null;
    }
    ch = stream.next();
    if (ch === '"' || ch === "'") {
      stream.eatWhile(stringEater(ch));
      stream.next();
      state.prev = true;
      return "string";
    }
    if (/[\[{\(]/.test(ch)) {
      state.prev = false;
      return null;
    }
    if (/[\]}\)]/.test(ch)) {
      state.prev = true;
      return null;
    }
    if (isNiladic.test(ch)) {
      state.prev = false;
      return "atom";
    }
